items.name: Collapsible Sidebar
items.description: Fluid-transition sidebar with icon-only mode to maximize workspace

items.name: Notification Badges
items.description: System alerts for cost overruns, quality drops, and threshold breaches

items.name: Theme Modes
items.description: Persisted dark, light, and system preferences with first-paint resolution and browser-chrome alignment

items.name: KPI Cards
items.description: Real-time metrics for workload, model IO, cache, cost, velocity, and tool reliability

items.name: Usage Attribution
items.description: Rank attributed workload by skill, agent, command, artifact, and workflow

items.name: AI Insights
items.description: Google Gemini-powered executive summaries on project health

items.name: Cost vs Velocity Charts
items.description: Track spending against task velocity over time with interactive area charts

items.name: Model Usage Charts
items.description: Model usage breakdown revealing allocation and cost drivers across sessions

items.name: Workflow Intelligence
items.description: Ranks workflows, agents, and skills by success, efficiency, quality, and risk

items.name: Session Block Insights
items.description: Break long sessions into time blocks with burn-rate and cost projections

items.name: Master Timeline
items.description: Full-width session lifecycle correlation view against token consumption

items.name: Token Semantics
items.description: Separate model IO, cache input, and observed workload for accurate attribution

items.name: 3-Pane Transcript
items.description: Fluid layout with log list, detail view, and metadata sidebar

items.name: Append-First Transcript Live Updates
items.description: Safe active-session deltas merge in place, with coarse invalidation and targeted REST recovery as fallback

items.name: Shared Content Viewer
items.description: Long-form prompts, markdown-like detail payloads, and raw file-backed session rows open in the standardized viewer shell

items.name: Deep Forensics
items.description: Queue pressure, resource footprint, subagent topology, and hook signals

items.name: Session Analytics
items.description: Token timeline, model allocation, session block insights, and master timeline

items.name: Artifact Cards
items.description: Skills, commands, agents, hooks, tasks, and test-run artifacts with source correlation

items.name: App Impact
items.description: Delivery outcomes, file footprint, validation movement, and workflow risk signals

items.name: Test Status
items.description: Track modified test files and run telemetry including framework, status, and timing

items.name: File Activity
items.description: Per-file action chips, touch counts, net diff, and session history in one table

items.name: Agent Cards
items.description: Card view of participating agents with click-to-filter transcript navigation

items.name: Feature-Centric Board
items.description: Kanban and list views grouping work by feature stage with drill-down modals

items.name: Document-First Discovery
items.description: Cross-references PRDs, implementation plans, and progress files automatically

items.name: Dependency-Aware Execution
items.description: Feature modals surface blocked-by chips, execution-gate summaries, family position, and family-sequence order

items.name: Kanban & List Views
items.description: Toggle between visual Kanban board and sortable list for different workflows

items.name: Drill-Down Modal
items.description: Overview, phases accordion, documents tab, and session summaries per feature

items.name: Phase & Task Tracking
items.description: Accordion phase view with real-time task checklist and deferred caveat indicators

items.name: Search & Filtering
items.description: Search by name, filter by category, status, and deferred state with sort controls

items.name: Session Correlation
items.description: Feature-linked session chips surface workload and cache share context

items.name: Deferred Task Tracking
items.description: Features with terminal-complete deferred steps land in Done with caveat badge

items.name: Planning Home
items.description: Hero stats, metrics strip, artifact chips, and the planning corpus overview

items.name: Planning Graph
items.description: Lane-based graph with DocChips, totals cells, and dependency-aware execution context

items.name: Triage Inbox
items.description: Blocked, mismatch, stale, and ready-to-promote tabs for fast cleanup

items.name: Live Agent Roster
items.description: Running and idle agents with state dots and live task context

items.name: Feature Drawer
items.description: Lineage strip, SPIKE tiles, inline OQ resolution, dependency DAG, and execution actions

items.name: Dynamic Project Switching
items.description: Instantly switch between multiple local projects from the sidebar

items.name: Project Context Config
items.description: Typed path-source configuration for sessions, plans, and progress tracking

items.name: Project Creation
items.description: Add projects with metadata and path roots persisted for future sessions

items.name: Card Grid View
items.description: Visual overview of PRDs, RFCs, and architecture docs in scannable card format

items.name: Folder Explorer
items.description: 3-pane IDE-style file explorer for navigating documentation hierarchies

items.name: Document Modal
items.description: Tabbed modal with Summary, Delivery, Relationships, Content, and Timeline views

items.name: Dependency-Aware Document Views
items.description: Plan cards and the document modal surface family lineage, sequence order, blocked-by links, and board navigation

items.name: Shared Viewer Rendering
items.description: Documents, plans, reports, and task sources share one formatted content shell with frontmatter-aware markdown rendering

items.name: Inline Document Editing
items.description: Edit plan documents in-modal with local save and GitHub write-back support

items.name: Project File Tree
items.description: Full project tree with gitignore-aware filtering and safety excludes

items.name: File Correlations
items.description: Per-file session involvement, feature links, document references, and activity

items.name: Cross-Surface Navigation
items.description: Deep-link from files into sessions, features, and plan documents for full context

items.name: Alert Rules Engine
items.description: Persisted threshold-based alerts with activate/deactivate toggle controls

items.name: Projects Tab
items.description: Per-project path editors, typed source selection, and testing configuration

items.name: Integrations Tab
items.description: SkillMeat and GitHub sub-tabs for token validation and workspace controls

items.name: Telemetry Exporter
items.description: Worker-side outbound queue, SAM push controls, queue-depth visibility, and disabled-state monitoring

items.name: AI Pricing Catalog
items.description: Global platform pricing with provider sync, exact-model rows, and manual overrides

items.name: Execution Workbench
items.description: Feature-scoped execution with safety pipeline, env profiles, and run history

items.name: Recommended Stack
items.description: Confidence-scored workflow suggestions based on historical outcomes and SkillMeat definitions

items.name: Dependency-Aware Review
items.description: The workbench shows execution gates, family position, blocked-by evidence, and navigation back to board, plans, sessions, and analytics

items.name: Run Launch UX
items.description: Pre-run review modal with editable command, working directory, and env profile selection

items.name: Safety Pipeline
items.description: Allow, approval-required, and deny command policies for auditable run lifecycles

items.name: Run History & Output
items.description: Streamed terminal output with run history, active run metadata, cancel, and retry

items.name: Embedded Workflow Intelligence
items.description: Feature-scoped leaderboard with failure patterns and direct registry handoff

items.name: Execution API
items.description: Persistent run events and approval workflow through dedicated backend endpoints

items.name: Workflow Catalog
items.description: Searchable catalog with correlation-state filters and keyboard navigation

items.name: Workflow Detail
items.description: Composition summary, effectiveness scores, issue cards, and representative sessions

items.name: Workflow Identity
items.description: Correlation state (strong/hybrid/weak), family refs, and SkillMeat resolution metadata

items.name: Cross-Surface Navigation
items.description: Registry actions open SkillMeat workflows, bundles, and representative sessions

items.name: SkillMeat Sync
items.description: Read-only cache for artifact, workflow, context-module, and bundle definitions

items.name: Observed Stack Extraction
items.description: Backfills historical sessions into stack observations against cached SkillMeat definitions

items.name: Canonical Transcript Intelligence
items.description: Local SQLite stays cache-oriented while enterprise Postgres acts as the canonical transcript-intelligence store

items.name: Approval-Gated Memory Drafts
items.description: CCDash can draft SkillMeat memory candidates from session intelligence, while publication remains operator-approved

items.name: Operator Tooling
items.description: CLI script to sync definitions, backfill observations, and recompute workflow rollups

items.name: Claude Code
items.description: Native JSONL parsing with sidecar enrichment for todos, tasks, teams, and tool results

items.name: Codex
items.description: JSONL payload parsing with tool/result correlation and signal extraction

items.name: Platform Registry
items.description: Centralized parser routing for adding platforms without changing API/UI contracts
